researched_category.notes: DataForSEO provides API access to SERP data, keyword metrics, backlinks, domain analytics, and other SEO/digital marketing data.

one_liner.value: API-first platform providing comprehensive SEO and digital marketing data including SERP results, keyword metrics, backlinks, domain analytics, and business listings.

methods.notes: Uses HTTP Basic Authentication with a login and an API password (auto-generated, distinct from account password). Credentials are Base64-encoded in the Authorization header.

access.notes: Anyone can sign up with a personal email on the register page. A free $1 credit is added upon registration for API testing. No phone verification, no waitlist, no admin gating. Higher rate limits are available with a Business account but the free tier is self-serve.

summary.value: DataForSEO provides a comprehensive REST API (v3) covering SERP, Keywords Data, Backlinks, Domain Analytics, On-Page, DataForSEO Labs, Business Data, Merchant, App Data, Content Analysis, and AI Optimization APIs. It supports webhooks/callbacks, has an OpenAPI specification, and official client libraries for Python, PHP, C#, Java, and TypeScript. A LangChain wrapper is also available.

agent_interface.notes: DataForSEO has an official MCP server (TypeScript, Apache 2.0, 223 stars) with support for all major APIs. It can be run via npx, npm, Docker, or deployed as a Cloudflare Worker. Official setup guide and launch announcement exist. Also has a LangChain integration and official SDKs.

rationale.value: DataForSEO has a fully public REST API with comprehensive documentation, self-serve free signup with $1 trial credits (no phone/email restrictions), and an official MCP server that works with Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, and other AI tools. There is no material blocker to building an agent toolkit today.

s1.quote: We provide comprehensive SEO and digital marketing data solutions via API.
s1.title: DataForSEO: Powerful API Stack For Data-Driven SEO Tools

s2.quote: DataForSEO APIs – Powerful Data Solutions for SEO and SEM. All the data for your SEO tool in one place.
s2.title: DataForSEO APIs

s3.quote: DataForSEO is using the Basic Authentication, which makes it possible to call our APIs with almost any programming language... Instead of 'login' and 'password' use your credentials from https://app.dataforseo.com/api-access
s3.title: Authentication – DataForSEO API v.3

s4.quote: DataForSEO API is using the REST technology for interchanging data between your application and our service.
s4.title: DataForSEO API v.3

s5.quote: To get a free trial, you should simply create an account with DataForSEO. Once you are logged into the DataForSEO Dashboard you’ll see your API credentials... upon registration free $1 credit for API testing will be added to your account balance.
s5.title: How does your free unlimited trial work?

s6.quote: Create your account. Personal email. $1 trial credits. No phone verification.
s6.title: DataForSEO - Register

s7.quote: Note that the minimum payment amount is $50.
s7.title: DataForSEO API v3 Pricing

s8.quote: This repository contains a YAML file in OpenAPI format (version 3.x) that describes the current API of the DataForSeo API.
s8.title: dataforseo/OpenApiDocumentation

s9.quote: YAML-formatted specification for all APIs. LangChain integration. DataForSEO API Wrapper.
s9.title: DataForSEO API v.3

s10.quote: Model Context Protocol (MCP) server implementation for DataForSEO, enabling AI assistants to interact with selected DataForSEO APIs and obtain SEO data through a standardized interface.
s10.title: dataforseo/mcp-server-typescript

s11.quote: DataForSEO MCP server is the implementation of the Model Context Protocol, allowing AI tools to obtain and process data from DataForSEO.
s11.title: Setting Up the Official DataForSEO MCP Server: Simple Guide

s12.quote: We’re announcing the launch of the DataForSEO MCP Server, a cutting-edge solution that connects DataForSEO APIs with AI agents like Claude.
s12.title: DataForSEO MCP Server Launch: Connect APIs and AI Agents

limitations: Could not find evidence of a specific Composio toolkit integration for DataForSEO; the existing agent interfaces (official MCP, LangChain, SDKs) are sufficient for building an agent toolkit.
